methodology.name: LLM Border Threat Taxonomy
methodology.description: OpenRouter free routing chooses the final country attribution and canonical threat category for each headline.

regional_summary_6h.headline: Iran's Hormuz blockade and US strikes heighten cross‑border tension, while Syria's chemical‑weapon discovery and Armenia's political crisis strain regional stability
bullets: Iranian fishermen in the Gulf of Oman are stranded after the Hormuz blockade, increasing pressure on Turkey's southern maritime security assets
Tehran's condemnation of US strikes and threat of retaliation escalates diplomatic friction, raising the risk of spill‑over into the broader Middle East
Syria's discovery of remnants of an Assad‑era chemical weapons program and the detention of 18 suspects intensify security concerns along the Turkish‑Syria frontier
